title: lepisorus excavatus var. scolopendrium
intro: Lepisorus excavatus var. scolopendrium, also known as the Chinese fork-leaved fern or Scolopendrium fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lepisorus excavatus var. scolopendrium include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder for various medicinal uses, making it a valuable resource in traditional Chinese medicine.
